title: NIT Durgapur – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of Junior Research Fellow for candidates with M.E./M.Tech OR M.Sc, with applications accepted via email from 30 April 2026 to 28 May 2026 through the official website of National Institute of Technology Durgapur.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA - Rs. 42,000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
